mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.forum_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.summary, p.type, p.status, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.last_reply_time, p.cover_image, p.create_time, p.ip_location, u.nickname AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, f.name AS forum_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum f ON p.forum_id = f.id WHERE p.delete_flag = 0 AND p.status = 1 AND p.audit_status = 1 ORDER BY (p.view_count + p.like_count * 5 + p.comment_count * 10 + p.collect_count * 8) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT p.*, u.nickname AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, f.name AS forum_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum f ON p.forum_id = f.id WHERE p.id = #{id} AND p.delete_flag = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET like_count = like_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET comment_count = comment_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET collect_count = collect_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_top = #{isTop}, top_time = CASE WHEN #{isTop} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET is_essence = #{isEssence}, essence_time = CASE WHEN #{isEssence} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET forum_id = #{forumId} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE post SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND delete_flag = 0 AND status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post WHERE forum_id = #{forumId} AND delete_flag = 0 AND status = 1

SELECT p.id, p.forum_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.summary, p.type, p.status, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.last_reply_time, p.cover_image, p.create_time, p.ip_location, u.nickname AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, f.name AS forum_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum f ON p.forum_id = f.id WHERE p.delete_flag = 0 AND p.user_id = #{userId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id, p.forum_id, p.user_id, p.title, p.summary, p.type, p.status, p.view_count, p.like_count, p.comment_count, p.collect_count, p.is_top, p.is_essence, p.last_reply_time, p.cover_image, p.create_time, p.ip_location, u.nickname AS user_name, u.avatar AS user_avatar, f.name AS forum_name FROM post p LEFT JOIN user u ON p.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN forum f ON p.forum_id = f.id WHERE p.delete_flag = 0 AND p.forum_id = #{forumId} AND p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.is_top DESC, p.create_time DESC
